mapper.select: SELECT *, (6371000 * ACOS( COS(RADIANS(#{lat})) * COS(RADIANS(latitude)) * COS(RADIANS(longitude) - RADIANS(#{lng})) + SIN(RADIANS(#{lat})) * SIN(RADIANS(latitude)) )) AS distance FROM toilets WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND deleted_at IS NULL HAVING distance <= #{radius} ORDER BY distance

SELECT *, (6371000 * ACOS( COS(RADIANS(#{lat})) * COS(RADIANS(latitude)) * COS(RADIANS(longitude) - RADIANS(#{lng})) + SIN(RADIANS(#{lat})) * SIN(RADIANS(latitude)) )) AS distance FROM toilets WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND deleted_at IS NULL
AND is_24hours = 1
AND is_wheelchair = 1
AND has_diaper = 1
AND has_emergency = 1
AND has_paper = 1
AND has_sanitary = 1
HAVING distance <= #{radius} ORDER BY distance
SELECT * FROM toilets WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY name
SELECT * FROM toilets WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT t.*, COALESCE(AVG(r.score), 0) AS avg_score, COUNT(r.id) AS review_count FROM toilets t LEFT JOIN reviews r ON t.id = r.toilet_id AND r.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY t.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO toilets (name, address, latitude, longitude, open_hours, is_24hours, is_wheelchair, has_paper, has_soap, has_sanitary, has_diaper, toilet_type, has_emergency, source, status, by_user_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{openHours}, #{is24hours}, #{isWheelchair}, #{hasPaper}, #{hasSoap}, #{hasSanitary}, #{hasDiaper}, #{toiletType}, #{hasEmergency}, #{source}, #{status}, #{byUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE toilets SET name = #{name}, address = #{address}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, open_hours = #{openHours}, is_24hours = #{is24hours}, is_wheelchair = #{isWheelchair}, has_paper = #{hasPaper}, has_soap = #{hasSoap}, has_sanitary = #{hasSanitary}, has_diaper = #{hasDiaper}, toilet_type = #{toiletType}, has_emergency = #{hasEmergency} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE toilets SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM toilets WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE toilets SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM toilets WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
